subcodes.first_line: Thy letter attained unto the presence of the Wronged One and was adorned with the lights of the countenance of the Desired One. Render praise unto the Beloved of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی المظلوم فائز و بانوار منظر مقصود مزین گشت حمد کن محبوب عالمیان را
